CalculateField AK_InflowsOutflows_hfv2 hl_link ""AK" + str(!OBJECTID!)" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField AK_InflowsOutflows_hfv2 hl_link ""Alaska" + str(!OBJECTID!)" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
JoinField AK_InflowsOutflows_hfv2 hl_link ak_ngen_tdx_hydrolocations hl_link hf_id;poi_id;hl_uri "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField AK_InflowsOutflows_hfv2 ref_ID ak_ref_tdx_flowlines ID START_X;START_Y;END_X;END_Y "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField AK_InflowsOutflows_hfv2 poi_id ak_ngen_tdx_flowpaths poi_id_int order;id "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField AK_InflowsOutflows_hfv2 flowpath_id ak_ngen_tdx_flowpath_attributes link TopWdth;TopWdthCC "Select transfer fields" #
Buffer AK_InflowsOutflows_hfv2 C:\Users\richard.gibbs\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\PacNextGenInflows\PacNextGenInflows.gdb\AK_InflowsOutflows_hfv2_CCBuff_int TopWdthCC Full Round "No Dissolve" # Planar

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
